channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US Wants China To Play Role In Ending Iran War, Says Marco Rubio As Trump Meets Xi
item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US President Donald Trump is set to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping today in a high-stakes summit between the two countries.

item.title: Macron's Wife 'Slapped' Him Over Flirty Text With Iranian Actor: Report

media:content.media:description: Macron, according to Tardif, also told Farahani that "I find you very pretty."

item.description: The claim was made in a new book titled "An (almost) perfect couple" by Paris Match journalist Florian Tardif. In the book, Tardif alleged that Macron, 48, and Farahani, 42, were in a 'platonic relationship' for several months.
item.content:encoded: The claim was made in a new book titled "An (almost) perfect couple" by Paris Match journalist Florian Tardif. In the book, Tardif alleged that Macron, 48, and Farahani, 42, were in a 'platonic relationship' for several months.

item.title: Is Taiwan Already Independent? Dispute With China Explained
item.description: For decades, the Republic of China in Taipei also claimed to be the legitimate Chinese government, but in 1971 Beijing took over the China seat at the United Nations from Taipei.
item.content:encoded: For decades, the Republic of China in Taipei also claimed to be the legitimate Chinese government, but in 1971 Beijing took over the China seat at the United Nations from Taipei.

item.title: China's Door Will Open Wider To US Businesses: Xi Jinping Tells US CEOs

media:content.media:description: Neither US or China is looking for a breakthrough. They are looking to avoid another breakdown.

item.description: Trump-Xi Summit: The US President wants China to stop weaponising supply chains, especially rare earths that power US tech and defence industries.
item.content:encoded: Trump-Xi Summit: The US President wants China to stop weaponising supply chains, especially rare earths that power US tech and defence industries.

item.title: Visionary, Icon, Villain: What China Thinks About Tesla CEO Elon Musk

media:content.media:description: Elon Musk has 2.3 million followers on China's Weibo.

item.description: Elon Musk is among a group of more than a dozen CEOs and top executives accompanying US President Donald Trump to Beijing for a summit with Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk is among a group of more than a dozen CEOs and top executives accompanying US President Donald Trump to Beijing for a summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: In Araghchi's India Visit, A #Minab168 Reminder For World

media:content.media:description: Araghchi and other foreign ministers of the BRICS member states will call on PM Modi

item.description: The situation surrounding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz-- the vital waterway through which around a fifth of global oil supply passes in peacetime-- is expected to feature prominently in bilateral talks between Araghchi and Jaishankar.
item.content:encoded: The situation surrounding the closure of the Strait of Hormuz-- the vital waterway through which around a fifth of global oil supply passes in peacetime-- is expected to feature prominently in bilateral talks between Araghchi and Jaishankar.

item.title: US Jury Finds 'Chinese Agent' Guilty Of Running 'Secret Police Station'

media:content.media:description: China's government has called the charges against Lu Jianwang in the case "fabricated".

item.description: Federal prosecutors in Brooklyn said Lu Jianwang, 64, should have alerted the US Attorney General that he was a Chinese agent.
item.content:encoded: Federal prosecutors in Brooklyn said Lu Jianwang, 64, should have alerted the US Attorney General that he was a Chinese agent.

item.title: Employee Brings 12-Year-Old Son To Work In China. He Plays With Fire, Destroys Office
item.description: No one was injured in the blaze, but losses are estimated to be tens of thousands of yuan.
item.content:encoded: No one was injured in the blaze, but losses are estimated to be tens of thousands of yuan.

item.title: JD Vance Announces Major Crackdown On Healthcare Fraud
item.description: Washington, May 14 (IANS) Vice President J.D. Vance announced a sweeping crackdown on alleged Medicaid and Medicare fraud, accusing several Democratic-led states -- particularly California, New York and Hawaii -- of failing to police abuse in federal
item.content:encoded: Washington, May 14 (IANS) Vice President J.D. Vance announced a sweeping crackdown on alleged Medicaid and Medicare fraud, accusing several Democratic-led states -- particularly California, New York and Hawaii -- of failing to police abuse in federal

item.title: Trump China Visit LIVE Updates: Trump Offers Praise As Xi Warns Of Confrontation Over Taiwan At Summit

media:content.media:description: Trump China Visit Live: Trade ties between Beijing and Washington have been fraught in recent years

item.description: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's 2-Day China Visit Live Update: During the trip, US arms sales to Taiwan, China's controls on rare-earth exports, and the countries' raucous trade relationships are among the main issues expected to be taken up by Trump and Xi.

item.title: Trump Administration Freezes New Medicare Enrollments For Hospice And Home Health Agencies
item.description: People across the United States have raised concerns about rising health costs and barriers to access, sometimes from the federal government's own actions
item.content:encoded: People across the United States have raised concerns about rising health costs and barriers to access, sometimes from the federal government's own actions

item.title: Trade, Iran War, Taiwan On Trump-Xi Summit Agenda

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump shakes hands with Xi Jinping at Great Hall of the People in Beijing

item.description: The US and China are weighing a potential framework whereby each country identifies some $30 billion in goods on which tariffs could be eased without threatening national security interests
item.content:encoded: The US and China are weighing a potential framework whereby each country identifies some $30 billion in goods on which tariffs could be eased without threatening national security interests

item.title: Hantavirus Update: 6 Cruise Passengers Travel To Australia
item.description: Six passengers who sailed on a hantavirus-affected cruise will fly to Australia from the Netherlands on Thursday while dressed in full protective...
item.content:encoded: Six passengers who sailed on a hantavirus-affected cruise will fly to Australia from the Netherlands on Thursday while dressed in full protective...

item.title: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' Over Taiwan: Xi's Big Warning To Trump

media:content.media:description: Xi said he was "happy" to receive Trump for the US leader's first trip to China since 2017

item.description: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' If Taiwan Issue Mishandled: Xi To Trump
item.content:encoded: Trump-Xi Summit: US, China Could 'Come Into Conflict' If Taiwan Issue Mishandled: Xi To Trump

item.title: Hantavirus Update: US Patient With Symptoms Tests Negative
item.description: US health officials said Wednesday a patient who had exhibited mild hantavirus symptoms and is in a biocontainment unit in the state of Georgia had...
item.content:encoded: US health officials said Wednesday a patient who had exhibited mild hantavirus symptoms and is in a biocontainment unit in the state of Georgia had...

item.title: Is Hantavirus Mutating To Become More Contagious? US Experts Say No

media:content.media:description: There is currently no evidence that hantavirus has mutated

item.description: European and US health experts say the hantavirus linked to the deadly MV Hondius cruise outbreak shows no evidence of mutating to become more contagious. Officials continue monitoring passengers worldwide as investigations into transmission continue
item.content:encoded: European and US health experts say the hantavirus linked to the deadly MV Hondius cruise outbreak shows no evidence of mutating to become more contagious. Officials continue monitoring passengers worldwide as investigations into transmission continue

item.title: Did Hantavirus Start In Argentina's 'End Of The World' City? Ushuaia Denies Link

media:content.media:description: The virus is believed to have come aboard in Ushuaia.

item.description: The MV Hondius outbreak has drawn attention because passengers dispersed to multiple countries, increasing the risk of spreading the virus worldwide.
item.content:encoded: The MV Hondius outbreak has drawn attention because passengers dispersed to multiple countries, increasing the risk of spreading the virus worldwide.

item.title: Hantavirus In Italy: 4 Quarantined People Test Negative
item.description: Four people who have been under observation in Italy for possible hantavirus infection have all tested negative, the Italian health ministry said on Wednesday. Tests were
item.content:encoded: Four people who have been under observation in Italy for possible hantavirus infection have all tested negative, the Italian health ministry said on Wednesday. Tests were

item.title: Hantavirus Risk Low In Africa, But Preparedness Urged By WHO
item.description: Addis Ababa, May 13 (IANS) The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) and the World Health Organization (WHO) urged health authorities and the general public to remain alert and strengthen Hantavirus surveillance measures desp
item.content:encoded: Addis Ababa, May 13 (IANS) The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) and the World Health Organization (WHO) urged health authorities and the general public to remain alert and strengthen Hantavirus surveillance measures desp

item.title: Cuba Runs Out Of Fuel Amid Iran Crisis, 20-Hour Power Cuts Follow

media:content.media:description: Cuba faces its worst rolling blackouts in decades amid a US blockade. (File)

item.description: Cuba has installed 1,300 megawatts of solar power over the past two years, but much of that capacity is lost to grid instability amid fuel shortages.
item.content:encoded: Cuba has installed 1,300 megawatts of solar power over the past two years, but much of that capacity is lost to grid instability amid fuel shortages.
